title: Separate User Functionality from System Management Functionality
description: Separate user functionality from system management functionality.

checks.name: Standard Users Are Not Local Administrators
checks.purpose: Verify no standard daily-use accounts are members of the local Administrators group, enforcing separation between user and admin roles

checks.name: UAC is Enabled
checks.purpose: Confirm User Account Control is enabled to prompt for elevation when administrative actions are attempted, creating a functional boundary between user and management functions

checks.name: Admin Accounts Follow Separate Naming Convention
checks.purpose: Verify administrative accounts are named distinctly from standard user accounts, ensuring admins use separate accounts for privileged operations

checks.name: Standard Users Are Not Local Administrators
checks.purpose: Verify no standard user accounts hold local administrator rights on the server

checks.name: UAC is Enabled
checks.purpose: Confirm UAC is enabled on the server to require elevation for management functions

checks.name: Admin Accounts Follow Separate Naming Convention
checks.purpose: Verify server administrator accounts are distinct from standard user accounts by naming convention

checks.name: Domain Admins Group Membership is Controlled
checks.purpose: Verify Domain Admins group has limited, documented membership to prevent privilege creep in the domain management boundary

checks.name: SSH Root Login Disabled
checks.purpose: Verify PermitRootLogin is set to no in sshd_config, preventing direct remote access to the root management account

checks.name: No Regular Users Have UID 0
checks.purpose: Confirm no non-root accounts have UID 0, which would grant unrestricted system management privileges to a user account

checks.name: Sudo Not Configured for Unrestricted Passwordless Access
checks.purpose: Verify sudoers does not grant NOPASSWD ALL to non-root users, ensuring a challenge is required when users invoke system management functions

checks.name: SSH Root Login Disabled
checks.purpose: Verify PermitRootLogin is set to no in sshd_config, preventing direct remote access to the root management account

checks.name: No Regular Users Have UID 0
checks.purpose: Confirm no non-root accounts have UID 0, which would grant unrestricted system management privileges to a user account

checks.name: Sudo Not Configured for Unrestricted Passwordless Access
checks.purpose: Verify sudoers does not grant NOPASSWD ALL to non-root users, ensuring a challenge is required when users invoke system management functions

remediation: Remove standard user accounts from the local Administrators group. Enable UAC. Create separate admin accounts (e.g., adm_username) for administrative tasks. On Linux, set PermitRootLogin no in /etc/ssh/sshd_config and restrict sudo access to only required commands for each user.
